title: Match Play (Masters)
metaDescription: 2025-2026 Match Play Masters tournament details, entry form, qualifying results, and bracket results.

sections.heading: Tournament Details
sections.content:
Masters division match play tournament with qualifying round followed by head-to-head competition.

  • Date: January 3, 2026
  • Location: Super Bowl, Appleton
  • Entry Fee: See entry form
  • Status: Completed
  • Contact: Beth Kosiorek — bethkusbc@gmail.com
